title: Astronomers Find a New Type of Space Explosion
summary: When big stars die, they explode and send elements like carbon and iron into space. Sometimes, two dead stars called neutron stars crash into each other, creating a kilonova explosion that makes gold and uranium. Scientists have only seen one clear kilonova, in 2017. Now, they might have found a second one, but it's different. The new event, called AT2025ulz, started like a kilonova but then looked like a supernova. Some scientists think it might be a "superkilonova" – a kilonova caused by a supernova. This has never been seen before. The discovery could help us learn more about how elements are made in space.

keywords.explanation: a big explosion when a star dies
an explosion when two dead stars crash together, making heavy metals like gold
the very dense leftover of a dead star
ripples in space that happen when big objects crash

questions.question: What do some scientists think AT2025ulz might be?

background_read: The universe is full of stars. When big stars die, they explode and send out elements that help make new stars and planets. Sometimes, two dead stars crash into each other, creating a special explosion called a kilonova that makes heavy metals like gold. Scientists use special tools to detect these explosions and learn more about space.
Article_Structure: WHO: Astronomers like Mansi Kasliwal and David Reitze.
WHAT: They might have found a new type of cosmic explosion called a superkilonova.
WHERE: The explosion happened 1.3 billion light years away, detected by telescopes and LIGO.
WHY: This helps us understand how elements are made in space.

perspectives.description: They think this could be a new kind of explosion never seen before.
They think it might just be a normal supernova, not a kilonova.
